title: Optimized Vanilla Plus
description: My Personal Vanilla + QOL Mod Pack
body:
![Banner Render](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2KcF3HMq/images/2d58a572a0231d4198756cb3c9fb8ef2e4d4557d.png)

This mod pack is my personal best version of Minecraft and is the definitive version in my opinion.


# This includes mods like :

### Optifine Parity Mods
So you never feel like you are missing out by using this modpack.

### Inventory Mods
To be more precise these mods add some features to the inventory just for QOL sake.

### Bug Fix Mods
So you can enjoy a more seamless Minecraft experience.

### Visual and Cosmetic Mods
Just some new visuals for some extra eye-candy whilst you are playing.


#

And Much More!!


<details>
